name: Smoky Barbecue Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Use chili sauce that is similar to ketchup, not the hot spicy variety with chile peppers.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except ribs.
3. Dip each rib into the sauce.
4. Place coated ribs in the cooker.
5. Pour the remaining sauce over ribs in the pot.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 5-6 hours or until meat is tender.
